Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Encounter Records RIFs Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.7 43 

CLM_RCPT_DT 

LABEL: Claim Receipt Date 

DESCRIPTION: The date the encounter was submitted into the CMS Encounter Data System (EDS). 

SHORT NAME: CLM_RCPT_DT 

LONG NAME: CLM_RCPT_DT 

TYPE: DATE 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CMS Encounter Data System (EDS) 

FILE(S): IP base 
SNF base 
HH base 
OP base 
Carrier base 
DME base 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: It is the transaction control number
